close_reason: Positive observation: fail-fast on ?field= for plain-string backend
description: src/lib.rs:113-123 explicitly rejects ?field= queries with a clear error message that points to backends which DO support it (aws-sm). Echoes the same good-pattern noted in crate-secretsx-bdu0.17 for azure-kv. Worth recording as an example of the 'reject early, explain why, point to the alternative' style other backends in this workspace should match.
title: Good: fail-fast on ?field= for plain-string backend
